records.question: What tracks named Free Speech For The Dumb were composed exactly by Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Free Speech For The Dumb' AND tracks.composer = 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks where tracks.name = 'Free Speech For The Dumb' and tracks.composer = 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright' limit 5
records.thought: I need to find tracks with the exact name 'Free Speech For The Dumb' and composer exactly matching 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright'. Since we're filtering by exact track name and exact composer, I'll use equality comparisons rather than LIKE patterns.

records.question: Which tracks named Soldier Side - Intro composed by Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo are MPEG audio files lasting at least 63764 milliseconds and priced at most 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
WHERE tracks.milliseconds >= 63764 AND media_types.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 AND tracks.composer = 'Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo' AND tracks.name = 'Soldier Side - Intro'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks join media_types on tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id where tracks.name like '%Soldier Side - Intro%' and tracks.composer like '%Dolmayan, John/Malakian, Daron/Odadjian, Shavo%' and media_types.name like '%MPEG%' and tracks.milliseconds >= 63764 and tracks.unit_price <= 0.99 limit 5
records.thought: I need to find tracks with a specific name, composer, media type (MPEG audio), minimum duration, and maximum price. I'll join tracks with media_types to filter by MPEG audio format.

records.question: What tracks composed by Nando Reis have a unit price of exactly 0.99 and a file size of at most 9138846 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
WHERE tracks.bytes <= 9138846 AND tracks.composer = 'Nando Reis' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks where composer like '%Nando Reis%' and unit_price = 0.99 and bytes <= 9138846 limit 5
records.thought: I need to find tracks composed by Nando Reis with unit_price of exactly 0.99 and bytes at most 9138846. The composer is a direct column in tracks table, so I can filter directly without joins.

records.question: Which tracks have the name exactly equal to 'Daughter', have the composer exactly equal to 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder', and also have related genres and related playlist_tracks records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
JOIN playlist_tracks ON tracks.id = playlist_tracks.track_id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Daughter' AND tracks.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks join genres on tracks.genre_id = genres.id join playlist_tracks on tracks.id = playlist_tracks.track_id where tracks.name = 'Daughter' and tracks.composer = 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder' limit 5
records.thought: We need to find tracks with exact name 'Daughter' and exact composer 'Dave Abbruzzese & Jeff Ament & Stone Gossard & Mike McCready & Eddie Vedder' that have related genre and playlist_tracks records. We'll use joins to ensure these relationships exist and apply exact matching on the text fields.

records.question: Which tracks named Koyaanisqatsi composed by Philip Glass are Soundtracks, have a Protected AAC audio file format, last exactly 206005 milliseconds, cost 0.99, and have at least 3305164 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN genres ON tracks.genre_id = genres.id
WHERE media_types.name = 'Protected AAC audio file' AND tracks.milliseconds = 206005 AND tracks.composer = 'Philip Glass' AND genres.name = 'Soundtrack' AND tracks.bytes >= 3305164 AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND tracks.name = 'Koyaanisqatsi'

records.question: Which tracks named What It Takes are priced at 0.99 and available as MPEG audio files?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
WHERE media_types.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND tracks.name = 'What It Takes' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks join media_types on tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id where tracks.name like '%What It Takes%' and tracks.unit_price = 0.99 and media_types.name like '%MPEG audio%' limit 5
records.thought: I need to find tracks named 'What It Takes' with unit_price of 0.99 and media_type of 'MPEG audio'. I'll join tracks with media_types to filter by media type name, and filter by track name and price.

records.question: Which tracks named O Que Vai Em Meu Coração composed by Mônica Marianno come from the album Demorou..., have a unit price of 0.99, last at least 255373 milliseconds, and are no more than 8366846 bytes by artist Mônica Marianno?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE albums.title = 'Demorou...' AND tracks.unit_price = 0.99 AND tracks.bytes <= 8366846 AND tracks.milliseconds >= 255373 AND artists.name = 'Mônica Marianno' AND tracks.composer = 'Mônica Marianno' AND tracks.name = 'O Que Vai Em Meu Coração'
records.pred_sql: select tracks.id from tracks join albums on tracks.album_id = albums.id join artists on albums.artist_id = artists.id where lower(tracks.name) like '%o que vai em meu coração%' and lower(tracks.composer) like '%mônica marianno%' and lower(albums.title) like '%demorou%' and tracks.unit_price = 0.99 and tracks.milliseconds >= 255373 and tracks.bytes <= 8366846 and lower(artists.name) like '%mônica marianno%' limit 5
